payload.author: agent
payload.body:
Fixed via stage-0 bootstrap. trust, trust-rustc, xtask were #![strict]+named-arg syntax, which only compiles THROUGH the trust-rustc wrapper — but trust-rustc IS the wrapper, an unbuildable cycle on a clean checkout. Reverted the three to plain Rust (no marker, positional calls): a toolchain can't self-host its frontend before it's built (standard staged bootstrap).

Now: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace + cargo run -p trust all work under STOCK rustc (24 test binaries pass, clippy -D warnings clean) — CI needs no wrapper for the workspace. Dialect still dogfooded: lints on the strict library crates, named-arg/pipe syntax on the examples/ fixtures (built via wrapper in CI). Also regenerated stale auto-gen artifacts so gen-docs/gen-std-signatures --check pass; updated CI dogfood step + dogfooding.md.
